situational_context: Running comeback well established: 16 structured runs since May 3 (75 days in). Distance peaked at 8.0 km (Run #16, Jul 15, suffer 57) — new comeback record, absorbed cleanly (next-day HRV 45, BALANCED). Currently on vacation in Saint-Malo (Jul 12–27) with family; no e-bike commuting. VO2max running improved to 41.7 (from 38.3 at comeback start). ACWR at 1.37 — within comeback bounds (≤1.50). HRV weekly avg recovered to 37 ms (from 35 on Jun 14, meeting the P1 target). Chronic load building steadily: 22.7 (from 17.5 on Jun 14, +30%). Weight data stale: only one reading since Jun 14 (103.67 kg on Jun 21), 26 days without weighing — priority to resume. Nutrition logging completely stopped — zero entries for weeks. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest overdue (target was July 2026). Baby (Léonie, ~18 months) occasionally fragments sleep but recent 7d avg is adequate at 7.49h.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Marche côtière active 45 min + pesée Withings

recommendations.text: Resume nutrition logging and weigh in Sunday. 26 days without a scale reading and zero food logging make body composition management impossible. TDEE recalibrage (scheduled Jul 19) cannot run without intake data. Log every meal starting now; complete the Sunday Withings weigh-in.
recommendations.measurable: ≥3 meals logged per day for 7 days; Sunday Jul 19 weigh-in completed

recommendations.text: Schedule Vitamin D retest — now overdue (target was early July). Dec 2025 level was 27 ng/mL (insufficient). Stress-fracture risk remains ~2× elevated until confirmed ≥40 ng/mL. Find a lab in Saint-Malo or schedule for return to Paris (Jul 27+).
recommendations.measurable: Lab order placed or appointment booked within 10 days

recommendations.text: Consolidate the 8 km breakthrough before progressing. Run #16 (8.0 km, suffer 57, avg HR 146) was the longest and hardest comeback run. Next-day HRV 45 was a strong recovery signal, but effort was borderline Z3. This week's runs target 6–7 km at Z2 (HR ≤145) to let tissue adapt before pushing to 9 km.
recommendations.measurable: Run #17 and #18 completed at avg HR ≤145 bpm, no post-run pain >24h

markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 1.37 — healthy within comeback protocol but approaching the zone where caution applies. Run #16 spiked acute load; 2 rest days before Run #17 should stabilize.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Must weigh in by Jul 19 (Sunday pesée)
markers_to_watch.reason: 26 days without a reading. Last known 103.67 kg (Jun 21). Trajectory unknown — body composition management stalled.
Dec 2025 level was 27 ng/mL (insufficient). Supplementation ongoing but unconfirmed. Stress-fracture risk elevated at current body weight.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain lasting >24h post-run → skip next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #16 was a significant step-up (8 km, suffer 57). Tissue tolerance at 103 kg remains the bottleneck.
